name: Redsun Properties Group Limited
summary: Redsun Properties Group Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the property development business in the People's Republic of China. It operates in three segments: Property Development, Commercial Property Investment and Operation, and Hotel Operations. The company focuses on the development of residential properties; and development, operation, and management of commercial and other properties. It also leases properties; operates hotels; and sells construction materials. The company was incorporated in 2017 and is headquartered in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China. Redsun Properties Group Limited is a subsidiary of Redsun Properties Group (Holdings) Limited.
